install.name: Module content
install.label: Install / reinstall content
install.hint: Creates the folder and the 3 crafting macros in this world (in the world's language).

install.title: Crafting Workshops — Setup
install.prompt: Install the crafting macros (lightsaber, potions & talismans, tuning) into this world?
install.promptHint: You can reinstall at any time from Configure Settings → Sabacc & Workshops.
install.gmOnly: Only the GM can install the content.

common.assignCharacter: Assign yourself a character (right-click the actor → Assign) or select your token.

potions.title: ⚗️ Crafting — Potions & Talismans
potions.intro: Artisan: {name} — alchemy draws on the Force (+1 Force die on the check). Final Encumbrance 0.
potions.symb:
Spending symbols — alchemy draws on the Force {force} ({light}/{dark} generate Advantage/Threat):
{suc} each net Success: −2 h of brewing time (min. 1 h) · {adv}: beneficial effect · {adv}{adv}: duration / thrift · {adv}{adv}{adv}: batch / potency · {tri} or 4 {adv}: formula learned · {thr}{des}: complication.

res.title: ⚗️ Resolution — {name}
res.fail: ❌ Failure — the crafting attempt fails (ingredients wasted).

item.madeBy: Crafted by {name} ({skill}). Time: {time} h · Materials: {cost} cr.
item.triumphLeft: ★ Unspent Triumph — major narrative effect of the GM's choice.

poison.eff: Inflicts a poison: the target makes a Resilience check or suffers wound damage.

stimulant.eff: Removes 1 Critical Injury or +1 rank to a characteristic for 5 rounds.

fearFetish.eff: Forces a Fear check on nearby enemies.

fireBrew.eff: The next Engaged-range attack gains Burn 2.

vigorElixir.eff: Recovers all strain; grants immunity to Fear for 1 encounter.

weakPotion.eff: The target suffers −1 rank to one characteristic (Resilience to resist).

destinyTalisman.eff: 1×/session: reroll one check or flip a Destiny Point.

powerAmulet.eff: +1 Force die to one chosen power while worn.

willPotion.eff: Dominates a target's will (Discipline to resist).

healAccel.eff: Doubles the wearer's natural healing rate.

neuralCharm.eff: Clouds the mind: +2 Setback to social checks against the wearer.

shieldAmulet.eff: Absorbs the first Critical Injury of the encounter.

lifeWater.eff: Revives or stabilizes a dying character; major narrative effects.

resistSymbol.eff: +2 Soak and immunity to one energy type for 1 encounter.

dur.label: Extended duration
dur.desc: +1 h of effect, or +1 round in combat

formula.label: Formula learned
formula.desc: −1 difficulty on future attempts to craft this recipe (★ or 4 ⬆)

saber.title: ⚔️ Craft / Recustom — Lightsaber
saber.intro: Artisan: {name} — the crystal sets the profile (official dataset values). "Possible" mods = Step 2 upgrades, rolled separately.

sum.test: Check: Mechanics {d3} (or Knowledge/Lore) · 3 days · materials 300 cr or a Streetwise check {d2}.
sum.testHint: On your own saber: −2 difficulty (min. Simple). Force-sensitive: add a Force die {force}.

confirm.overBody: {used} hard points used out of {tot}. Continue?

fail.title: ⚔️ Crafting failed — {crystal}
fail.body: The Mechanics check fails: the saber is not assembled (components can be recovered).
fail.despair: 💀 Despair: a crystal or part is damaged (GM's choice).
fail.hint: Try again with more time, better tools, or by spending a Destiny Point.

recap.possibleMods: Possible mods (Step 2) — each: tool kit, 100 cr, Mechanics {pips}:

res.adv: → reduce the time or install one mod for free
res.noRoll: Stat card only (no check) — to be confirmed with a Mechanics check in play.

mod.crystalNoHp: Extra crystal at no HP cost

CORRUPTCRYS.1: When the character wielding this saber…

CRACKEDCRYS.1: If a combat check results in a [DE]…

DANTARI.1: When making a Force power check…

ETAAN.1: If the wielder uses the Reflect talent…

SOLARICRYS.1: Reduces the strain of the Reflect incidental by 1…
SOLARICRYS.2: The crystal stops working if the wielder's Morality…

SORIAN.1: When used with the Parry talent…

UNSTKYBER.1: As a maneuver, the wielder increases…

THONTIIN.1: Once per encounter, allows the wielder to ignore…

ZOPHIS.1: When the Sunder quality is activated…

BLADEDRAIN.1: When making a combat check against…

CCARRAY.1: Adds an extra crystal at no HP cost
CCARRAY.2: While the lightsaber is ignited, may…

CURVEDHILT.1: Adds an automatic [AD] to combat checks…

DUALPHASE.1: May change the blade's length once…

HILTMASK.1: Adds [FA][FA] to any attempt to identify…

WALKHILT.1: Unless it is ignited, a successful check is required…

CATFAILMOD.1: When the lightsaber is activated, it…

warn.noItems: {name} has no weapon/armor with hard points.
warn.noAttach: {name} has no installed attachment with activatable mods. Install an attachment first (or drag one from the compendium onto the item).

mode.intro: On {name}'s gear, what do you want to do?
mode.install: Install an attachment: mount a part on a hard point (difficulty based on rarity).
mode.mod: Activate a mod: improve an already-installed attachment — difficulty increases by 1 per mod already activated on that attachment (book rule).

sum.att: Attachment: {name} — costs {hp} hard point(s), {price} cr, rarity {rarity}.
sum.test: Check: Mechanics {diff} — finding the part: {price} cr or a Streetwise check.

confirm.title: Not enough hard points
confirm.body: {name} costs {hp} hard point(s), {free} free. Force it?

fail.title: 🔧 Installation failed — {att}
fail.body: The Mechanics check fails: the attachment is not mounted on {item}.
fail.despair: 💀 Despair: part lost or item damaged (GM).
fail.hint: Try again with more time or better tools.

res.adv: → reduce the time or install one mod for free
res.noRoll: Noted without a check — to be confirmed with a Mechanics check in play.

done.install: {att} installed on {item}. For the full mechanics, drag the attachment from the compendium.

mod.title: ⚙️ Activate an attachment mod
mod.hint: Base Average {pips}, +1 per mod already activated on this attachment. Cost: tool kit + 100 cr.
mod.noneWarn: No mod option left on this attachment.

modFail.title: ⚙️ Modification failed — {mod}
modFail.body: The Mechanics check fails: the mod is not activated on {att}.
modFail.despair: 💀 Despair: attachment damaged, one already-installed mod is deactivated (GM).
modFail.hint: The difficulty does not increase (the mod is not installed). Try again with more time / tools.

modCard.title: ⚙️ Modification — {item} ▸ {att}
modCard.next: Mods activated on this attachment: {now}/{total} · next modification = {diff}
modCard.adv: → reduced time or −1 difficulty on the next one

telescope.note: Removes up to 2 {setback} due to range (long/extreme).

laserSight.note: Adds {boost} to attack checks at short range.
